creator: denis_emelyanov@bns-group.ru
text:
Re-running failing command without redirecting to null gives:

[/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/gnome-packagekit/work/gnome-packagekit-2.32.0/man]# docbook2man gpk-application.sgml
Using catalogs: /usr/local/share/sgml/catalog
Using
stylesheet: /usr/local/share/sgml/docbook/utils-0.6.14/docbook-utils.dsl#print
Working
on: /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/gnome-packagekit/work/gnome-packagekit-2.32.0/man/gpk-application.sgml
Can't locate SGMLS/Output.pm in @INC (@INC
contains: /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.12.2/BSDPAN /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.12.2/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.12.2 /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.12.2/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.12.2 .) at /usr/local/bin/sgmlspl line 56.
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /usr/local/bin/sgmlspl line 56.
